series_metadata.series_description: Industrial Commission order worksheets are completed by hearing officers pursuant to decisions rendered under Revised Code Chapters 4121, 4123, and 4131. The worksheets contain information to be included in published orders based on the instruction in the worksheets. After the orders are typed, they are reviewed and signed by hearing officers and published. The original orders are retained in the claim file or on file with the Industrial Commission as mandated in the respective Adm. Code or Revised Code.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: 90 days in origin format or platform (dictation, transcription, Word document, etc.)
